positive: A stylized, retro mid-century atomic-era illustration of a group of playful, geometric space robots traversing a stylized desert landscape. Flat design, muted mustard yellows, teal, and burnt orange color palette. Inspired by 1950s travel posters, clean lines, vector art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, gradient shading
